holdings.infoBox: GSEU is an equity ETF with a total of 347 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.59%, MSCI Europe Net Total Return Future Sept 26 at 2.00%, HSBC Holdings at 1.85%, Novartis AG at 1.84%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.83%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs ActiveBeta Europe Equity ETF (GSEU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of developed Europe large- and mid-cap equities comprising of four sub-indices: value, momentum, quality and low volatility. The index uses multiple factors to pick stocks, and each sub-index receives equal weight GSEU was launched on Mar 2, 2016 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Exclusive: Malaysia - Even $3 billion not enough to settle 1MDB case with Goldman
data.text: Malaysia's new government would not be willing to accept even compensation of $3 billion from Goldman Sachs in a settlement over the 1MDB scandal, the finance minister told Reuters, ruling out a figur...
